message:
feat(fnp-python): conformance_rounding.rs harness (6 tests, 100 cases)

Tests native rounding functions against NumPy oracle:
- sign: 20 cases including zeros, negatives, inf, nan
- floor: 20 cases including half-values, large numbers, inf/nan
- ceil: 20 cases including half-values, large numbers, inf/nan
- rint: 20 cases including banker's rounding edge cases
- trunc: 20 cases including negative truncation toward zero
- Empty array edge cases for all five functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
